name: Artemnesia VoIP
description: Artemnesia VoIP (Honeypot). Tool: http://artemisa.sourceforge.net. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #599 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Artemnesia VoIP output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
